/CAL:SENTENCING/X:SFPD OFFICER WOODS GAVE IMPACT STATEMENT/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO DISMISS PRIOR STRIKE - GRANTED, ALLEGATION OF 2ND STRIKE, 245(C)PC,FELONY (OFFICER GRIFFITH);6-9-05, STANISLAUS CNTY IS DISMISSED,/X:COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDER:THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING FINDINGS: IT IS IN THEINTEREST OF JUSTICE TO DISMISS THE SECOND STRIKE BECAUSE IT FALLS OUTSIDE THE SPIRIT OF THE THREE STRIKES LAW, THE STRIKE RESULTED FROM BROKEN GLASS FALLING ON A POLICE OFFICER WHO WAS NOT INJURED, DEFENDANT WAS HANDCUFFED AND SEATED IN THE BACK OF A POLICE CAR,  THE DEFENDANT TWISTED THE HAND AND ARM OF A SECOND OFFICER AND SUFFERED A SEPARATE STRIKE CONVICTION,  IT WOULDNOT FURTHER THE INTERESTS OF JUSTICE TO ENHANCE DEFENDANT'S SENTENCE BASEDON ACTS THAT AROSE FROM THE SAME OPERABLE FACTS,  DEFENDANT WAS ALSO TWENTY TWO YEARS OLD,  THE STRIKE IS REMOTE IN TIME HAVING OCCURREDTWENTY YEARSAGO,  DEFENDANT'S MOTHER AND FATHER DIED OF AIDS WHEN DEFENDANT WAS AN ADOLESCENT, DEFENDANT CURRENTLY SUFFERS FROM A PSYCHIATRIC DISORDER, POST TRAUMATIC STRESS, AND WAS UNDER THE INFLUENCE OF NARCOTICS AT THE TIME OF THE CURRENT CRIME,  /AJW/CH1:SP 16M:M /CH4:SP 48M:M /CH7:SP 16M:M /CH8:SP 24M:M/X:SENTENCES AS TO COUNTS 2, 3, & 4 IS 190 DAYS CJ AND 190 DAYS CTS/ENH:CH1:TYPE667(A)(1):TI60M:CS/ENH:CH1:TYPE667,5(B):TI24M:S/X:TOTAL  11   YEARS- 8 MONTHS STATE PRISON/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED  165 DAYS COUNTY JAIL,25 SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 190 DAYS,/STATES/DNACOMP/2933,1(C)/X:RESTITUTION IS RESERVED,/COA:40/ICNA/VF5:300/PAR/CDC/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/
/CAL:SENTENCING & DEFENSE MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL/MO DENIED/X:COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE SENTENCING/CONTD:SENTENCING & DEFENSE MOTION TO STRIKE PRIORS/DOP/

docket_entries.docketEntryComment: /CAL:SENTENCING/X:SFPD OFFICER WOODS GAVE IMPACT STATEMENT/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO DISMISS PRIOR STRIKE - GRANTED, ALLEGATION OF 2ND STRIKE, 245(C)PC,FELONY (OFFICER GRIFFITH);6-9-05, STANISLAUS CNTY IS DISMISSED,/X:COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDER:THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING FINDINGS: IT IS IN THEINTEREST OF JUSTICE TO DISMISS THE SECOND STRIKE BECAUSE IT FALLS OUTSIDE THE SPIRIT OF THE THREE STRIKES LAW, THE STRIKE RESULTED FROM BROKEN GLASS FALLING ON A POLICE OFFICER WHO WAS NOT INJURED, DEFENDANT WAS HANDCUFFED AND SEATED IN THE BACK OF A POLICE CAR,  THE DEFENDANT TWISTED THE HAND AND ARM OF A SECOND OFFICER AND SUFFERED A SEPARATE STRIKE CONVICTION,  IT WOULDNOT FURTHER THE INTERESTS OF JUSTICE TO ENHANCE DEFENDANT'S SENTENCE BASEDON ACTS THAT AROSE FROM THE SAME OPERABLE FACTS,  DEFENDANT WAS ALSO TWENTY TWO YEARS OLD,  THE STRIKE IS REMOTE IN TIME HAVING OCCURREDTWENTY YEARSAGO,  DEFENDANT'S MOTHER AND FATHER DIED OF AIDS WHEN DEFENDANT WAS AN ADOLESCENT, DEFENDANT CURRENTLY SUFFERS FROM A PSYCHIATRIC DISORDER, POST TRAUMATIC STRESS, AND WAS UNDER THE INFLUENCE OF NARCOTICS AT THE TIME OF THE CURRENT CRIME,  /AJW/CH1:SP 16M:M /CH4:SP 48M:M /CH7:SP 16M:M /CH8:SP 24M:M/X:SENTENCES AS TO COUNTS 2, 3, & 4 IS 190 DAYS CJ AND 190 DAYS CTS/ENH:CH1:TYPE667(A)(1):TI60M:CS/ENH:CH1:TYPE667,5(B):TI24M:S/X:TOTAL  11   YEARS- 8 MONTHS STATE PRISON/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED  165 DAYS COUNTY JAIL,25 SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 190 DAYS,/STATES/DNACOMP/2933,1(C)/X:RESTITUTION IS RESERVED,/COA:40/ICNA/VF5:300/PAR/CDC/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/
